skills.description: Turn the current git branch into a crisp review-ready brief with local status, touched areas, changed files, recent commits, and the next PR action.

People who keep getting asked what changed and what should happen next
detail_lines: Reads local git state and turns branch name, compare base, upstream distance, touched areas, status-aware changed-file previews, and recent commits into one compact review brief.

Defaults feature branches toward a main-like review base such as the remote default branch, main, master, or trunk when their upstream is only the same remote feature branch, so the handoff stays PR-oriented instead of push-oriented.
Stays honest about what local git can prove and does not invent GitHub metadata, CI state, or reviewer status.
skills.default_prompt: Use $branch-brief-bar to inspect the current git branch locally, choose a review-ready compare base, summarize upstream status, touched areas, changed files, recent commits, and the next review action, or build a compact macOS menu-bar brief that keeps the handoff honest.

packs.title: App-Specific Skills
packs.summary: Skills tied closely to specific local app codebases and their live product surfaces.

packs.title: Audience and Fandom Strategy
